ab: heza nak uskunan tupa’un tu Kimat, qanglac naip minpungul madas qemangsut.
ch: 我有一個同學叫Kimat，他常常忘記帶東西。
en: I have a classmate named Kimat, he often forgets to bring things.

ab: maca isnava’anin na, simul naip han uskunan inpicu’, isqeqesqes mintun patasan tu haqel.
ch: 上課的時候，他跟同學借鉛筆、橡皮擦或是筆記本。
en: During class, he borrowed pencils, erasers or notebooks from his classmates.

ab: matu miuc’an, mupusan, muti’un, pasimulanng zami naip qemangsut.
ch: 一次、兩次、三次，大家會借東西給他。
en: Once, twice, three times, everyone would lend him something.

ab: qala madikla’ nip pi, qanglac simul la nitu macoqes qemangsut.
ch: 但是他有個壞習慣，經常借了東西卻不還。
en: But he has a bad habit of often borrowing things but not returning them.

ab: dungzavin amin cam nitu asa pasimul cai qemangsut.
ch: 變得大家都不想借他東西了。
en: In the end, no one wanted to borrow anything from him.

ab: heza tu tas’a qani’an muskun cam munata paqaqenan.
ch: 有一天，我們大家一起去郊遊。
en: One day, we all went on an outing together.

ab: matu han dan na, asa ka Kimat munata, qala minpungul naip madas haqel isqesqes.
ch: 路途中，Kimat想上廁所，但他忘記帶衛生紙。
en: On the way, Kimat wanted to go to the bathroom, but he forgot to bring toilet paper.

ab: simul naip han uskunan haqel isqesqes, amin cam antalam tupa tu, uka amin nak inadas.
ch: 他跟同學借衛生紙，可是大家都回他說，我也沒有帶耶。
en: He borrowed toilet paper from his classmates, but everyone told him that I didn’t bring them either.

ab: tangicin na Kimat, mahau’ naip tupa tu “makua amu tuna amin nitu pasimul zaku haqel isqesqes!”
ch: Kimat急的哭了出來。他生氣的說，為什麼大家都不借我衛生紙!
en: Kimat burst into tears. He said angrily, why don’t everyone lend me toilet paper!

ab: tupaun uskunan tu “opa ni asu anak madas, musutu maca pasimul su’u qemangsut, ni asu qanciap macoqes!”
ch: 同學告訴他，因為你都不自己帶，而且借給你的東西，你都不會還!
en: The classmate told him, because you didn’t bring it yourself, and you wouldn’t return the things lent to you!

ab: munkaku’in laqbing, matingmut ta Kimat kahan kaku’, aminun Kimat ta sinimul cia qemangsut macoqes han uskunan.
ch: 隔天上學，Kimat很早就到學校了，Kimat把跟同學借的東西都還給同學們。
en: The next day at school, Kimat arrived at school early and returned everything he had borrowed from his classmates.

ab: masihan na Kimat uskunan masumsum, tupa tu na’anakanakin naip madas qemangsut, miqumican uskunan pasimul cia qabas qemangsut.
ch: kimat向同學們道歉，並說他以後一定會自己帶東西，也謝謝同學們之前願意借他東西。
en: Kimat apologized to the students and said that he would definitely bring his own things in the future, and thanked the classmates for their willingness to lend him things before.
